previous_wording: Structured contamination is difficult to localize statistically (AUPRC 0.05-0.07)
new_wording: Simple contamination near-perfectly localizable (~0.93); structured markedly lower on average (~0.35) but heterogeneous: temporal (M04/M05) hard (~0.13), entity/source (M08/M09) moderately detectable (0.43-0.69)
change_reason: old numbers used pre-correction mechanisms; corrected M08/M09 more detectable

previous_wording: Detectability-exploitability correlation is category-driven; global r=0.73; within-category r~0
new_wording: Positive global association (r~0.69, wide CI); strong within-category associations for simple (0.95) and structured (0.86); detectability adds incremental R2~0.11 beyond category; boundary is exception (M03 outlier)
new_numeric: global r=0.692 CI[0.157,0.951]; within simple 0.949, structured 0.862, boundary -0.044

previous_wording: Model family affects exploitation; RF=2.2xLR, CatBoost=2.5xLR
new_wording: Model family associated with exploitation (all pairwise vs LR significant), but small magnitudes: RF/LR 1.21, CatBoost/LR 1.30, TabM/LR 1.14; boosting trees most, LR least, TabM intermediate
new_numeric: LR 0.134, RF 0.162, LightGBM 0.175, CatBoost 0.175, TabM 0.153; ratios 1.1-1.3x

previous_wording: Three-axis profiles consistent across core models (5 models, 11 mechanisms)
new_wording: Broadly consistent (mean Spearman 0.85, Kendall W 0.88) with mechanism-specific exceptions: TabM negative harm on M04/M05; quadrant disagreement at M02/M03
new_numeric: mean pairwise Spearman 0.845, min 0.591, W 0.876, quadrant 9/11
change_reason: full 5-model incl real TabM reveals mechanism-specific exceptions

previous_wording: General model capacity causally drives exploitation
new_wording: (unchanged) not tested; no within-family capacity gradient
(supported) simple mean harm > structured; consistent with CL2/CL10
(unchanged) TabM negative on M04/M05 observed but no causal claim
